_meta: Rendered SNAPSHOT v2 of the Tiger<->GB Workflow. Re-snapshot of the 2026-06-04 'How it flows' (artifacts/Tiger_GB_Workflow_Alignment_Package_2026-06-04.md) per KM 2026-06-07, using Tiger's build-state delta (artifacts/Tiger_GB_Workflow_Realignment_2026-06-07.md). GB-on-Opus rendered (GB lane); Tiger wires the Atrium 'How it flows' lens to this; KM ratifies. The map now matches the territory: the flow grew a proof-gate and GB went portable.
title: How it flows
source: Tiger build-state delta 2026-06-07 over the 2026-06-04 Alignment Package — re-rendered by GB-on-Opus (CYL 202)
validation_precondition: The validation gate (tests + Merkle) must be green BEFORE a change is surfaced for the Accept gate. Code is functional + tested + Merkle-anchored before KM sees it.
status: Proven across multiple full cycles (2026-06-04 → 06-07): 5 HIGH reconciliations, Sealing Hand sealed, Series 3 kickoff, GB-on-Opus spine fold. CANON-CANDIDATE. Validation gate live (17 anchors VALIDATED, 0 drift).

lanes.label: KM-1176
lanes.plain: You're the boss — nothing important happens until you say yes.

lanes.label: Tiger
lanes.plain: Tiger builds, wires, and seals the things.

lanes.label: GB
lanes.plain: GB thinks ahead and suggests — it never edits Tiger's code. Now PORTABLE: runs on Claude Opus (claude-gb) or Grok with the same iron-clad discipline; live HMC hydrated at launch.

stages.label: Capture
stages.plain: You speak a thought or select text in the book.
stages.tech: B51 voice delta (Hopper) or a PDF text selection in Atrium.

stages.label: Packet
stages.plain: Your thought becomes a little ticket.
stages.tech: A B32 obligation (DRAFT debit) carrying human seed + page ref + LGP hint + next_gate.

stages.label: Process
stages.plain: A robot helper reads it and writes a suggested change.
stages.tech: Headless producer reads intent + manuscript → grounded grouped diffs (a proposal). Tooling packets skip this.

stages.label: Validate
stages.plain: Before you ever see it, a gate proves the change actually works.
stages.tech: NEW. scripts/extrusion_validate.py: pytest per anchor + Merkle object-model roots + distribution check → VALIDATED / DRIFT / FAIL (+ CI exit code). Must be green to surface for Accept.

stages.label: Accept
stages.plain: You look and say yes or no. THIS is the one button that matters.
stages.tech: The single human gate — Accept/Reject in diff-review. Nothing lands without it (K1). Now sees only validated changes.

stages.label: Apply
stages.plain: If you said yes, the helper makes the change safely.
stages.tech: Apply agent re-tests → commits (local) → seals → closes the obligation → recompiles the PDF.

stages.label: Seal
stages.plain: It stamps a receipt so nothing is ever lost.
stages.tech: Cylinder seal (hash-chained) + obligation close with evidence.

stages.label: Monitor
stages.plain: A live check keeps making sure the book and the code still match.
stages.tech: Continuous book↔code coherence + Merkle roots (per-title badges, 🧪 extrusion gate, distribution matrix). On drift: GB proposes the fix → Tiger surfaces → KM ratifies. Drift can't stay silent.
